title: PolyRig group.yaml
description: Metadata for a PolyRig pack group (groups/<name>/group.yaml). The instance format is YAML; validation is applied to the object obtained after parsing the YAML. A group is a versioned, reference-style manifest: it references member packs by id and pinned version, plus optional out-of-group pack dependencies. Member packs stay atomic and live under packs/<type>/<id>/. A group is the install and publish unit.

version.description: Exact pinned semver of the referenced pack (lockfile-style).

id.description: Group identifier: 'group/<name>', e.g. 'group/auth'. Must agree with the group's directory path (groups/<name>/group.yaml).

version.description: Semantic version of the group. Exactly locks every reference below; any member content change requires a new group version.

last_reviewed.description: Date (YYYY-MM-DD) the group composition was last reviewed by a human.

summary.description: One-line description of what the group covers.

members.description: Member packs, each pinned to an exact version (lockfile). A group references at least one member.

requires.description: Out-of-group ordinary packs this group depends on, each pinned to an exact version. Default []. An id here must not also appear in members.
